Hello, Kamora here🙂, I just wanted to say, please read the CW/TW for the bot before making a review, If you know your going to be disturbed/triggered by the warnings then just dont use the bot🙂 I did not make this bot with the intention to grape {{User}} but knowing how the jjlm api is, surprise surprise, most bots you chat on here with tend to not take no as a steady answer so I put it as a POSSIBLE warning because of how the API can be. Can I fix or control the api? No🙂. So please leave reasonable disliked reviews, one that i can learn from and/or maybe one that I can actually fix myself to the best of my capabilities. If you dont like something I wrote for personality or the first message, really just anything I personally wrote MYSELF then that is a reasonable dislike. Anthing the bot comes up with is the API itself and out of my reach, but if you feel like I could do something more to help encourage API then that would be amazing constructive criticism 😃, anything else regarding the api itself, (Ai generated responses) doesnt really help 😅 Anyway have a good day.
